title: Precedence, Priority, and Final Section Ordering
acceptance_criteria: Section output exposes fixed precedence L2 > L1 > L0.
priority only sorts within the same layer.
L0/L2 remain server-required and cannot be AI-selected manually.
Final stable id order is deterministic.

implementation.description: Write failing tests for precedence metadata, same-layer priority sorting, and AI attempts to select L0/L2.
implementation.expected_failure: Tests fail because precedence/order metadata is not implemented.

implementation.description: Implement deterministic final ordering and precedence metadata in the section service.
Centralize ordering logic and keep cross-layer precedence independent from same-layer priority.
quality_checks: L2 > L1 > L0 is encoded once.
Output order is stable across runs.
